017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.function.*;
024
025/**
026 * Resolves ${var} and ${?var} substitutions in the parsed HOCON tree.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Resolution algorithm: single-pass depth-first over the tree. Substitutions reference paths in the
030 * root object (e.g., ${database.host}). Optional substitutions (${?var}) are silently removed if
031 * the path does not exist. Required substitutions (${var}) throw if the path is missing.
032 * Circular references are detected and cause an error.
033 *
034 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
035 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://github.com/lightbend/config/blob/main/HOCON.md">HOCON Specification</a>
036 * </ul>
037 */
038public class HoconResolver {
039
040   private final HoconValue.HoconObject root;
041   private final Set<String> inProgress = new HashSet<>();
042
043   /**
044    * Constructor.
045    *
046    * @param root The root HOCON object (after parsing, before resolution).
047    */
048   public HoconResolver(HoconValue.HoconObject root) {
049      this.root = root;
050   }
051
052   /**
053    * Resolves all substitutions in-place in the tree.
054    *
055    * @throws RuntimeException If a required substitution path is missing or circular.
056    */
057   public void resolve() {
058      resolveObject(root);
059   }
060
061   private void resolveObject(HoconValue.HoconObject obj) {
062      var it = obj.getMembers().entrySet().iterator();
063      while (it.hasNext()) {
064         var e = it.next();
065         var resolved = resolveValue(e.getValue());
066         if (resolved == null)
067            it.remove();
068         else
069            e.setValue(resolved);
070      }
071   }
072
073   private HoconValue resolveValue(HoconValue val) {
074      if (val == null)
075         return null;
076      return switch (val.getType()) {
077         case STRING, NUMBER, BOOLEAN, NULL -> val;
078         case OBJECT -> {
079            resolveObject((HoconValue.HoconObject) val);
080            yield val;
081         }
082         case ARRAY -> {
083            var arr = (HoconValue.HoconArray) val;
084            var elements = arr.getElements();
085            var toRemove = new ArrayList<Integer>();
086            for (var i = 0; i < elements.size(); i++) {
087               var resolved = resolveValue(elements.get(i));
088               if (resolved == null)
089                  toRemove.add(i);
090               else
091                  elements.set(i, resolved);
092            }
093            for (var i = toRemove.size() - 1; i >= 0; i--)
094               elements.remove(toRemove.get(i).intValue());
095            yield val;
096         }
097         case SUBSTITUTION -> resolveSubstitution((HoconValue.HoconSubstitution) val, false);
098         case OPT_SUBSTITUTION -> resolveSubstitution((HoconValue.HoconSubstitution) val, true);
099         case CONCAT -> resolveConcat((HoconValue.HoconConcat) val);
100         default -> val;
101      };
102   }
103
104   private HoconValue resolveSubstitution(HoconValue.HoconSubstitution sub, boolean optional) {
105      var path = sub.getPath();
106      if (inProgress.contains(path))
107         throw rex("Circular substitution: {0}", path);
108      inProgress.add(path);
109      try {
110         var found = lookup(path);
111         if (found == null) {
112            if (optional)
113               return null;
114            throw rex("Substitution ''${0}'' not found", path);
115         }
116         var resolved = resolveValue(found);
117         if (resolved != null)
118            return resolved;
119         return optional ? null : found;
120      } finally {
121         inProgress.remove(path);
122      }
123   }
124
125   private HoconValue resolveConcat(HoconValue.HoconConcat concat) {
126      var sb = new StringBuilder();
127      for (var p : concat.getParts()) {
128         var resolved = resolveValue(p);
129         if (resolved != null)
130            sb.append(resolveConcatPart(resolved));
131      }
132      return new HoconValue.HoconString(sb.toString());
133   }
134
135   private static String resolveConcatPart(HoconValue val) {
136      if (val == null)
137         return "";
138      return switch (val.getType()) {
139         case STRING -> ((HoconValue.HoconString) val).getValue();
140         case NUMBER -> ((HoconValue.HoconNumber) val).getValue().toString();
141         case BOOLEAN -> String.valueOf(((HoconValue.HoconBoolean) val).getValue());
142         case NULL -> "null";
143         default -> val.toString();
144      };
145   }
146
147   /**
148    * Looks up a dotted path in the root object.
149    *
150    * @param path The path (e.g., "database.host").
151    * @return The value at that path, or <jk>null</jk>.
152    */
153   public HoconValue lookup(String path) {
154      if (isEmpty(path))
155         return null;
156      var parts = path.split("\\.", -1);
157      return root.getPath(parts);
158   }
159
160   /**
161    * Resolves a concatenation value with a custom lookup (for self-referential substitution).
162    * When the concat contains ${path}, the lookup is used instead of the root object.
163    * This allows <code>path = ${path}"/bin"</code> to append to the previous value.
164    *
165    * @param concat The concatenation to resolve.
166    * @param lookup Custom lookup; for path X returns the value to use (e.g. previous value for self-ref).
167    * @return The resolved string value.
168    */
169   public HoconValue resolveConcatWithLookup(HoconValue.HoconConcat concat, Function<String, HoconValue> lookup) {
170      var sb = new StringBuilder();
171      for (var p : concat.getParts()) {
172         var resolved = resolveValueWithLookup(p, lookup);
173         if (resolved != null)
174            sb.append(resolveConcatPart(resolved));
175      }
176      return new HoconValue.HoconString(sb.toString());
177   }
178
179   private HoconValue resolveValueWithLookup(HoconValue val, Function<String, HoconValue> lookup) {
180      if (val == null)
181         return null;
182      return switch (val.getType()) {
183         case STRING, NUMBER, BOOLEAN, NULL -> val;
184         case OBJECT -> {
185            resolveObject((HoconValue.HoconObject) val);
186            yield val;
187         }
188         case ARRAY -> {
189            var arr = (HoconValue.HoconArray) val;
190            for (var i = 0; i < arr.getElements().size(); i++)
191               arr.getElements().set(i, resolveValueWithLookup(arr.getElements().get(i), lookup));
192            yield val;
193         }
194         case SUBSTITUTION -> resolveSubstitutionWithLookup((HoconValue.HoconSubstitution) val, false, lookup);
195         case OPT_SUBSTITUTION -> resolveSubstitutionWithLookup((HoconValue.HoconSubstitution) val, true, lookup);
196         case CONCAT -> resolveConcatWithLookup((HoconValue.HoconConcat) val, lookup);
197         default -> val;
198      };
199   }
200
201   private HoconValue resolveSubstitutionWithLookup(HoconValue.HoconSubstitution sub, boolean optional,
202         Function<String, HoconValue> lookup) {
203      var path = sub.getPath();
204      if (inProgress.contains(path))
205         throw rex("Circular substitution: {0}", path);
206      inProgress.add(path);
207      try {
208         var found = lookup.apply(path);
209         if (found == null) {
210            if (optional)
211               return null;
212            throw rex("Substitution ''${0}'' not found", path);
213         }
214         var resolved = resolveValueWithLookup(found, lookup);
215         if (resolved != null)
216            return resolved;
217         return optional ? null : found;
218      } finally {
219         inProgress.remove(path);
220      }
221   }
222
223}
